tool.name: scholar_scrape_paper
tool.description: Scrape detailed information from an academic paper page. Navigates to the paper URL and extracts title, authors, abstract, citation count, publication venue, and related metadata.

parameters.name: paper_url
parameters.description: URL of the paper page (e.g. 'https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.00001' or any academic paper URL)
